summary: Matched and named most of the interface timer unit, adding a new C implementation for src/melee/if/iftime.c and replacing address-style ifTime/fn symbols with semantic names for timer creation, update, visibility, countdown, reset, and teardown. The PR also propagated those names into headers and game-mode call sites, adjusted GALE01 split/symbol sizes for iftime data/BSS, and renamed a StartMeleeRules bitfield to timer_shows_hours to support the timer formatting logic. The decomp.dev bot reported 8 new fully matched iftime functions and partial matches for SetTime, CreateTimers, and UpdateTimers.
what_changed: Added the iftime implementation from an effectively empty src/melee/if/iftime.c, including model loading, digit animation frame selection, match timer setup/update, countdown setup/update, visibility helpers, reset, and freeing helpers.

Renamed iftime symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from address-based names such as ifTime_802F3AE8, ifTime_802F405C, fn_802F4194, and fn_802F428C to semantic names such as ifTime_SetTime, ifTime_HideTimers, ifTime_UpdateCountdown, and ifTime_UpdateTimers.
Updated src/melee/if/iftime.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders to typed declarations using HSD_JObj*, HSD_GObj*, int, void, and bool.
Split the old ifTime_804A1078 BSS symbol into ifTime_data at 0x804A1078 size 0x3C and ifTime_match_timer_models at 0x804A10B4 size 0x10, and adjusted the iftime data/BSS/sdata split endpoints.
Changed game-mode callers to use the new timer names: ifTime_FreeCountdown, ifTime_ShowTimers, ifTime_IsTimerHidden, ifTime_CreateTimers, ifTime_HideTimers, ifTime_Reset, and ifTime_FreeTimers.
Renamed StartMeleeRules.x1_6 to timer_shows_hours with the comment 'false=65:00.00, true=1:05:00.00', and updated gm_80167A64 to initialize timer_shows_hours.
Performed formatting/include cleanup in nearby gm and mn type files while preserving existing logic.
smart_moves: Used descriptive public API names that reflect lifecycle and HUD behavior rather than preserving address-style placeholders, making downstream gm_1B03 and gm_16AE call sites self-documenting.

Modeled iftime BSS as a static struct containing match_timer, countdown_timer, digit JObj pointers, countdown_seconds, padding, and countdown_timer_models, which made reset/free/visibility functions simple and consistent.
Separated the match timer model descriptor into its own BSS symbol, matching the symbol map change from one 0x50 object to a 0x3C data struct plus 0x10 DynamicModelDesc.
Introduced digit index macros such as IFTIME_HOUR_SEP, IFTIME_MINUTE_TEN, IFTIME_SECOND_ONE, plus ONES/TENS digit macros, making the timer-formatting function easier to audit.
Kept matching-specific details where needed, including PAD_STACK(0x18) in small visibility helpers and explicit panic/report strings for failed GObj/JObj creation.
Tied the previously anonymous StartMeleeRules bit to observed timer display behavior, which supports both matching and future semantic cleanup.
decomp_lessons: When a unit is mostly a lifecycle manager, naming the functions around create/update/show/hide/free/reset can quickly clarify call sites and reveal state ownership.
BSS discoveries should be reflected both in C layout and config symbols; here, recognizing that the old ifTime_804A1078 region contained two logical objects improved symbol accuracy.
Bitfield naming can unlock readable logic in a larger function: timer_shows_hours directly explains why ifTime_SetTime switches between minute-only and hour-inclusive formatting.
For HUD digit displays, preserving animation-frame based digit setting through a tiny helper can reduce repeated HSD_AObjReqAnim/HSD_AObjSetRate boilerplate while retaining match-friendly code shape.
Public headers should be upgraded from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS as soon as call signatures are known, because typed prototypes help propagate correct usage across gm and if files.
Bot match reports are useful evidence for what actually improved: this PR fully matched smaller lifecycle helpers while leaving larger SetTime/CreateTimers/UpdateTimers only partially matched.
naming_conventions: Module prefix uses camel-case subsystem style: ifTime_* for interface timer functions.
Lifecycle verbs chosen in PascalCase after the prefix: SetTime, HideTimers, ShowTimers, UpdateCountdown, FreeCountdown, UpdateTimers, CreateTimers, Reset, FreeTimers, IsTimerHidden.
Static/internal data names remain module-prefixed and descriptive: ifTime_data and ifTime_match_timer_models.
Boolean bitfield name uses a readable predicate-like field, timer_shows_hours, with a comment documenting the display format controlled by false/true.
Digit constants use all-caps module-prefixed macros such as IFTIME_HOUR_TEN and IFTIME_CENTISECOND_ONE.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(0x18) in ifTime_HideTimers and ifTime_IsTimerHidden, indicating stack-shape padding was required for matching small helper functions.
Kept exact HSD/Baselib object setup flow for UI objects: GObj_Create, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54, and HSD_GObjPLink_80390228.
Loaded archive sections with lbArchive_LoadSections using the observed section names ScInfTim_scene_models and tdsce, then copied joint/anims/matanims/shapeanims into a DynamicModelDesc.
Implemented countdown changes by comparing the computed countdown_seconds, removing/adding animation only when the digit changes, then requesting and animating frame 0.
Preserved panic/report strings and source line numbers in iftime.c failure paths, which can be important for data/string and control-flow matching.
Adjusted GALE01 split endpoints for .data, .bss, and .sdata after the C implementation and symbol-size refinements changed section accounting.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code increased to 37.51% (+0.02%, +820 bytes).

Bot reported 8 new fully matched functions in main/melee/if/iftime: ifTime_UpdateCountdown (+180), ifTime_ShowTimers (+140), ifTime_IsTimerHidden (+120), ifTime_HideTimers (+92), ifTime_FreeTimers (+92), ifTime_GetCountdownSeconds (+80), ifTime_FreeCountdown (+68), and ifTime_Reset (+48).
Bot reported partial improvements for unmatched functions: ifTime_SetTime reached 98.86% (+1380), ifTime_CreateTimers reached 76.72% (+711), and ifTime_UpdateTimers reached 65.38% (+313).
follow_up_queries: Inspect later PRs touching ifTime_SetTime, ifTime_CreateTimers, or ifTime_UpdateTimers to see how the remaining unmatched percentages were resolved.
Search for additional StartMeleeRules bitfield renames near timer_shows_hours to improve rules struct documentation.
Look for PRs that remove placeholder.h from iftime.h or further type DynamicModelDesc/countdown timer model data.
Compare iftime countdown model loading against other interface HUD model loaders for reusable archive-section patterns.
